Video.summary: Guest star Lucille Ball joins Carol for a glittering showbiz sketch, "The Rock Sisters!"
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Lucille Ball, George Carlin

Video.summary: Guest Tim Conway breaks up Harvey in "The Dentist." Also: Carol looks to steal the show from a Broadway star.
Video.title: Ethel Merman, Tim Conway

Video.summary: Steve Lawrence stars. Includes a take-off of film noir "Laura." Also: Stella Toddler meets The Oldest Man.
Video.title: Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Tim Conway and Charo guest! Tim plays a man at a unisex salon, a guy trying to stay awake, and a journalist.
Video.title: Tim Conway, Charo

Video.summary: Roddy McDowell & Ken Berry join in "High Hat", a spoof of Fred Astaire and Ginger Rogers movie musicals.
Video.title: Roddy McDowell, Ken Berry

Video.summary: Cass Elliot and Ricardo Montalban guest. Cass joins a sketch about wallflowers, Ricardo takes a playboy role.
Video.title: Ricardo Montalban, Cass Elliot

Video.summary: Carol welcomes Vincent Price and Joan Rivers!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Joan Rivers, Vincent Price

Video.summary: Guest star Soupy Sales plays a hospital patient, and joins Carol for the movie spoof "Mildred Fierce."
Video.title: Soupy Sales, Mel Torme

Video.summary: Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, and David Frost join Carol for an Italian-style production of Cinderella.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, David Frost

Image.alt: Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, David Frost
Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, David Frost
Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, David Frost
Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, David Frost
Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, David Frost
Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, David Frost
Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, David Frost
Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, David Frost

Video.summary: Rock Hudson stars, appearing with Carol as husband and wife anchors, and as secretary Mrs. Wiggins' date.
Video.title: Rock Hudson

Video.summary: Cass Elliot & Tim Conway star! Cass & Carol browse literature, and Tim is an odd substitute in "Carol & Sis."
Video.title: Tim Conway, Cass Elliot

Video.summary: Guests Robert Goulet and Imogene Coca take part in a fairy tale musical extravaganza.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Imogene Coca, Robert Goulet

Video.summary: Tonight's guests: Nanette Fabray and Trini Lopez!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Trini Lopez, Nanette Fabray

Video.summary: Tim Conway & The Pointer Sisters star! Sketches include "Up Your Income", and Tim as Nora Desmond's butler.
Video.title: Tim Conway, The Pointer Sisters

Video.summary: Carl Reiner appears in two sketches: as the husband of an accident-prone woman, and as a marriage counselor.
Video.title: Carl Reiner

Video.summary: Features Harvey as a man faking whiplash. On "The Family", Mama, Ed, and Eunice are invited to Mickey's place.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Guests Art Carney and Nanette Fabray appear in "Guess What's Coming To Dinner?" and "Passion On 10th Avenue."
Video.title: Nanette Fabray, Art Carney

Video.summary: Burt Reynolds and Nanette Fabray join the gang for a series of Carol's patented commercial parodies.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Nanette Fabray, Burt Reynolds

Video.summary: Carol is a dowdy secretary discouraging applicants, and the movie spoof "Flight 13 To Nowhere."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Nanette Fabray, Ken Berry

Video.summary: Phil Silvers & Jean Stapleton guest! Features "The Old Folks", commercial parodies, and a musical number.
Video.title: Phil Silvers, Jean Stapleton

Video.summary: Jim Nabors returns as a guest! Sketches include Harvey as a hammy actor, and Jim as an emergency room patient.
Video.title: Jim Nabors

Video.summary: Ken Berry and Natalie Cole are tonight's guests!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Natalie Cole, Ken Berry

Video.summary: Mama, Eunice, and Ed return from an inspiring Sunday sermon.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Jim Nabors

Video.summary: Harvey Korman leads a "Fireside Chat" with the First Family.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Eileen Farrell, Marily Horne

Video.summary: Tim Conway returns! Tim plays a lion, then teams with Harvey as a pair of military aircraft spotters.
Video.title: Tim Conway

Video.summary: Mae East returns to "V.I.P.", a Presidential "Fireside Chat", and a case of laryngitis on "Carol & Sis."
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Carol plays a housewife plagued by her husband's gambling. Meanwhile, a touring star takes the stage.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Guest star Ken Berry joins Carol, Dick, Vicki, and Tim for the musical movie spoof "Stolen Serenade."
Video.title: Ken Berry

Video.summary: Guest Lucille Ball joins Carol for "The Rock Sisters!" George Carlin is on hand with words that you CAN say.
Video.title: Lucille Ball, George Carlin

Video.summary: Dyan Cannon & Paul Lynde star. Lynde plays an insurance salesman, and Cannon is on "As The Stomach Turns."
Video.title: Dyan Cannon, Paul Lynde

Video.summary: Jim Nabors returns for his final season premiere! Also, new member Dick Van Dyke joins Tim for a pantomime.
Video.title: Jim Nabors

Video.summary: Features Dick as an airport traveller getting a farewell, and Tim as a steelworker seeking to do in his wife.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Guest George Gobel joins a "V.I.P." interview of a Duke and Duchess. A "Carol & Sis" sketch is also a prank.
Video.title: George Gobel

Video.summary: Jack Klugman & Tony Randall guest. Jack sings with Carol, while Tony appears in a tribute to Broadway sketch.
Video.title: Jack Klugman, Tony Randall

Video.summary: Kaye Ballard & Tim Conway star. Features spoof "The Dater's Game", and Tim as a service station attendant.
Video.title: Kaye Ballard, Tim Conway

Video.summary: Roddy McDowell stars! Includes Roddy joining "The Family" for a reunion, and a "Brief Encounter."
Video.title: Roddy McDowell

Video.summary: Telly Savalas guests! Telly and Harvey play businessmen. Also: TV commercials, and Telly as "Poopi Le Moko."
Video.title: Telly Savalas

Video.summary: Jane Connell and Tim Conway star! Harvey & Tim are tipsy friends coming home. Also: The Arabian Nights spoof.
Video.title: Jane Connell, Tim Conway

Video.summary: Garry Moore and Durward Kirby guest. Sketches include Carol as a princess and a look at the Safety Committee.
Video.title: Garry Moore, Durward Kirby
